metadata.notes: Complete CAD drawing in DXF format from grellier.fr. French/English bilingual. X-braced construction. Herringbone purfling layer included in DXF. Kerfed lining shown. Dimensions extracted from DIMENSION entities and MTEXT annotations in DXF.

name: Orchestra Model (OM)
description: Orchestra Model — auditorium body size with long scale (25.4 inches). Same body width as 000 but longer scale produces higher string tension, more headroom, and greater projection. Wider nut (1.75 inches typical) favored by fingerstyle players. Balanced tone with strong note definition. Martin introduced the OM in 1929.
cam_notes: DXF file available with herringbone and kerfed lining detail. Pending CAM generator.

scale.scale_length_source: DXF dimension 645.1mm extracted from dimension cluster
scale.scale_note: Long scale — standard OM. Higher tension than 000 (24.9 inch scale). More headroom and projection.

body.lower_bout_width_source: DXF dimension 380.5mm. Standard OM lower bout 384mm.
body.upper_bout_width_note: Standard OM upper bout. DXF geometry pending detailed extraction.
body.body_length_source: DXF dimension 492.0mm. Standard OM body length 498mm.
body.waist_width_note: Standard OM waist. DXF geometry pending detailed extraction.
body.body_depth_source: DXF dimensions 99.0mm and 104mm in side profile

soundhole.diameter_source: Circle entity r=49.25mm in DXF — two instances found

body.top_radius_source: radius table: 25 pieds (7,62 m) / top radius: 25 ft — DXF MTEXT
body.back_radius_source: radius fond: 15 pieds (4,57 m) / back radius: 15 ft — DXF MTEXT
body.back_radius_dxf_note: Arc entity r=4572mm confirmed in DXF geometry

bracing_labels.T5: X-brace arm lower right — appears 3 times (finger braces)

top_plate.thickness_source: table epicea ep. 2,8 mm / spruce top 2,8 mm thick — DXF MTEXT

back_plate.thickness_source: fond palissandre ep. 2,5 mm / rosewood back 2,5 mm thick — DXF MTEXT

sides.thickness_source: eclisses palissandre ep. 2,2 mm / rosewood sides 2,2 mm thick — DXF MTEXT

neck.material_source: manche acajou / mahogany neck — DXF MTEXT
neck.tail_block_source: spruce tailblock / tasseau epicea — DXF MTEXT
neck.headstock_veneer_source: rosewood headstock veneer / placage de tete palissandre — DXF MTEXT

fingerboard.source: ebony fingerboard / touche ebene — DXF MTEXT

bridge.source: rosewood bridge / chevalet palissandre — DXF MTEXT

binding.source: maple binding / erable ep. 3mm / maple 3mm thick — DXF MTEXT
binding.purfling_source: Herringbone layer in DXF — 18400 entities fully drawn

side_template.source: gabarit d'eclisse / side template — DXF MTEXT annotation present

key_differences_from_000.tension: OM has higher string tension due to longer scale
key_differences_from_000.tone: OM = more projection and clarity, 000 = warmer and softer
key_differences_from_000.body: Same body size — difference is entirely in scale and neck

notable_features: Herringbone purfling fully drawn — can be used for CNC rosette/purfling routing
Kerfed lining profile included — useful for side bending jig
Side template included as separate view

variants.name: Grellier OM
variants.description: C.Grellier design, version 1.1 November 2007. X-braced, rosewood back/sides, spruce top 2.8mm, mahogany neck, ebony board, rosewood bridge, maple binding, herringbone purfling.
variants.data_notes: Full DXF available with herringbone and kerfed lining detail. All material specs documented. Body outline ready for CAD tracing.
